visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Three young women in full ski and snowboarding gear stand on a bright, snowy mountain slope, posing with their arms raised in excitement; the lighting is crisp natural daylight. (2) A man dressed in traditional light grey Buddhist monk robes with a large beaded necklace walks into the frame, surprising the women; the background features a mix of evergreen trees and bare winter branches under a high-altitude sun. (3) A montage of snowy landscapes follows, featuring vending machines outside a modern facility and a young woman with pigtails and a black beanie talking directly to the camera in front of a wide mountain panorama. (4) Footage shows various people skiing and snowboarding down groomed trails; the main character is seen practicing in a grey and green ski outfit. (5) The scene shifts to a bright airport terminal where the girl struggles with two large black suitcases and a white coat, appearing fatigued. (6) Outdoor scenes show a large pink tour bus being loaded with luggage by staff while the girl gives a thumbs-up. (7) Inside the bus, the girl is wearing a neck pillow and sleeping soundly against the window. (8) She arrives at a hotel room, showing the view of the ski slopes through a large window, then proceeds to an indoor equipment area to fit purple socks into black ski boots. (9) The girl joins a group of students for an outdoor lesson with a professional instructor; they are seen practicing turns on the snow. (10) A series of indoor shots shows the girl at a well-lit buffet, eating various dishes including sushi, tempura, and fries while looking out at the snow through large glass windows. (11) The final scenes show the girl receiving a paper certificate indoors and a large group of about fifteen people in ski gear posing and cheering together in a resort hallway.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 雪地派對. (2) [Variety]: ???. [Subtitle]: 他是誰?. (3) [Variety]: 滑雪囉!. (4) [Subtitle]: 你身上有肉的味道. (5) [Variety]: 冰法師?. (6) [Slogan]: 懶人必備的DBC滑雪團來了. (7) [Subtitle]: 沒有參加DBC版本的千. [Variety]: 累. (8) [Subtitle]: 參加DBC版本的千. [Variety]: 要上車囉!. (9) [Subtitle]: 專車直接送你到. [Subtitle]: 我一上車就開始爆睡補眠. (10) [Variety]: YA! 到斑尾了. [Subtitle]: 超愛飯店外直接就是雪場. (11) [Variety]: (雪地) (雪地). [Subtitle]: 試穿完雪具就可以準備上課. (12) [Subtitle]: 來喔, 滑雪教練來了. [Variety]: 銀鈴, 很專業. (13) [Subtitle]: 我等一下要練 S Turn. [Variety]: 基礎動作!. (14) [Variety]: (基礎專精). [Subtitle]: 雖然是團體課, 但是教練非常細心. (15) [Subtitle]: 初學者不用擔心啦. (16) [Subtitle]: 雪場早晚餐吃buffet. [Subtitle]: 滑雪必須大吃特吃吧. (17) [Subtitle]: 我吃了好幾盤. [Variety]: ❤️. (18) [Subtitle]: 早上邊吃還可以邊看雪景. [Variety]: 超讚!. (19) [Variety]: YA 成功. (20) [Variety]: 領證書囉. [Variety]: 專業滑雪證照 👍. (21) [Slogan]: 初學者的好朋友DBC. [Slogan]: 現在報名正優惠喔. [Slogan]: 快去報名吧!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 monk-style figure, approximately 16 other students and staff in the final group shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long hair in two pigtail braids, often wearing a white jacket, black beanie, or a tan and green ski suit.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Outdoor backgrounds include snow-covered ski slopes, ski lifts, and distant mountains. Indoor backgrounds include an airport terminal, the interior of a pink tour bus, a hotel room, a ski equipment rental shop, and a large resort dining hall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic dance music begins immediately with a heavy, synthesized kick drum and a female voice shouting 'Woo!' at a high pitch. (2) A comedic transition occurs as the music shifts to a playful, slightly off-key acoustic tune while a male voice speaks in a dry, calm tone. (3) Fast-paced pop music resumes, featuring high-frequency shimmering synths and the rhythmic sound of rolling luggage on a ceramic tile floor. (4) Acoustic atmosphere briefly captures the low-end rumble of a bus engine idling and the muffled chatter of people boarding. (5) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition to a bright, enunciated female narration that is highly energetic and cheerful. (6) Distinct percussive sounds of ski gear clanking and the crunch of snow underfoot are heard clearly over the upbeat BGM. (7) Indoor dining sounds, such as the faint clinking of cutlery and plates, are mixed with the primary narration in a spacious acoustic environment. (8) The audio concludes with a loud, synchronized group cheer and clapping, showing very high vocal arousal and positive valence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem/Solution Comparison -> Detailed Experience -> Result/CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the DBC Ski Tour by highlighting its convenience and all-inclusive nature (transport, accommodation, lessons, food) compared to the stress of self-planned travel.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct mention of 'DBC Ski Tour' in text and narration, with a call to action to sign up for discounts.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular social media vlog format with heavy text overlays and fast cuts to keep viewers engaged while delivering promotional content.
